subject: Payment taken twice from my card
message: You charged my card two times for one order. I need this billing error corrected. What is the next step?

subject: Totally fed up, will contact a lawyer
message: This is the worst experience ever. Nobody helps me. I demand a manager and I will pursue legal action if this is not fixed.

subject: Random question about the moon
message: Just wondering something completely unrelated to your product and not covered anywhere.
